generated_exposure.exposure_text: I've lived in this neighborhood for 30 years, and I've seen how important it is for everyone to share our values. When new communities move in, it's only fair to ask them to adopt our way of life. My grandkids go to school with children from all backgrounds, and I've seen firsthand how much easier it is when everyone speaks the same language and follows the same traditions. We shouldn't expect people to give up who they are, but we all need to make an effort to fit in. That's just common sense, right?
